The sun rose over the quiet village. A young reader opened a worn book and began to learn.
Every chapter brought new words, new patterns, and new hope for tomorrow.
The library was small but full of stories waiting to be discovered.
One sentence at a time, the world grew larger and brighter.
Training on text teaches the model to predict what comes next.
Simple patterns repeat until they become familiar and clear.
Characters form words, words form lines, and lines form meaning.
This tiny book is enough to verify that learning works end to end.
